title: Invigorating Citrusy Australian Chicken Salad
description: A refreshing and healthy Australian-inspired chicken salad featuring citrus and vanilla flavors, perfect for a light meal or snack. This dish is low in calories and rich in protein.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper, then bake for 20 minutes or until cooked through.
In a blender or food processor, combine orange juice, lemon juice, vanilla extract, and honey, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together the blended citrus mixture and 1 tablespoon of olive oil to emulsify.
Add the mixed greens, sliced red onion, and chopped macadamia nuts to the bowl and toss to combine.
Once the chicken is cooked, let it cool, then chop it into bite-sized pieces and add it to the bowl.
Toss the salad gently to combine all the ingredients.
Refrigerate the salad for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the salad chilled, garnished with additional macadamia nuts if desired.
